name: skills
description: A collection of Agent Skills packaged as installable Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: Runs a bash shell script that echoes Hello World.

plugins.name: example-skill
plugins.description: Starter example skill plugin. Copy this directory to create your own.

plugins.name: blank-skill
plugins.description: Blank skill plugin with empty placeholder files. Copy this directory and fill it in.

plugins.name: session-doctor
plugins.description: Read-only diagnosis of Claude Code session and resume problems: JSONL corruption, broken parent chains, orphaned session dirs, oversized transcripts.

plugins.name: session-repair
plugins.description: Repairs damaged Claude Code session JSONL files so they can be resumed: drops corrupt lines, fixes empty content blocks, strips progress bloat, re-stitches parent chains. Always backs up first.

plugins.name: session-size-guard
plugins.description: Finds oversized or runaway Claude Code session files before they hang the CLI, shows what is bloating them (progress entries, tool results, attachments), and recommends fixes.

plugins.name: history-doctor
plugins.description: Inspects and repairs Claude Code's prompt history (history.jsonl) and the projects map in ~/.claude.json: malformed lines, stale entries for deleted projects. Safe, backup-first fixes.

plugins.name: session-collector
plugins.description: Bundle a Claude Code session (transcript, subagents, tool results, file history) into a portable tar.gz archive with optional secret redaction.

plugins.name: session-analyzer
plugins.description: Statistical analysis of Claude Code session transcripts: token usage, tool-call distribution, cache-hit ratio, expensive turns, branch points, and compaction events.

plugins.name: session-search
plugins.description: Find past Claude Code sessions across all projects by keyword and date, list projects, and extract any session as readable Markdown or JSON.

plugins.name: workspace-cleaner
plugins.description: Audit and safely reclaim disk space in ~/.claude: stale transcripts, debug logs, orphaned session artifacts, and legacy directories — dry-run first, opt-in per category.

plugins.name: sandbox-env-report
plugins.description: Collect a secrets-masked diagnostic snapshot of a Claude Code sandbox/remote environment: env vars, system info, tool versions, network reachability, and the claude.ai session URL.

plugins.name: session-format-reference
plugins.description: Authoritative reference for the Claude Code session JSONL transcript format and the ~/.claude directory layout, for building session tooling.
